subject: mathematics
notes: Subject-agnostic shape: any future subject (chemistry, biology, cs...) uses this exact structure. Keys: level = category level tag; d = lesson difficulty 1-5; min = estimated study minutes; sub = lesson subtopics (become the lesson's section outline); prereq = chapter-level prerequisite chapters. Slugs are derived from titles by the build script.
